overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character in a yellow and purple outfit walking through a sunny Los Santos neighborhood. The character travels from a commercial area with a food cart and pharmacy, across an intersection with a military vehicle, into a residential zone with single-family homes and palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with rainbow umbrella food cart

events.description: character crosses the street from the food cart area toward the pharmacy building

agents.ego_description: walking past the food cart with rainbow umbrella and crossing the street toward the green pharmacy building

notable_agents.action: vendor standing beside the food cart with rainbow umbrella

entered.detail: red food cart with large rainbow-colored umbrella and menu board
green corner building with large white signage reading Pills and Cigarettes
tall red and yellow sign for Horny's Burgers restaurant on hillside

segments.scene_description: The character begins near a colorful food cart on a commercial sidewalk, then crosses the street toward a prominent green pharmacy building. The scene is bright and sunny with clear skies, typical of a Los Santos commercial strip.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial corner with green pharmacy building

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past the green pharmacy building and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in yellow shirt standing near the pharmacy entrance
woman walking while talking on phone

entered.detail: multi-story red building with balconies and arched windows
tall palm tree on sidewalk near intersection

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the sidewalk beside the green Pills Cigarettes building, passing pedestrians including a man in a yellow shirt and a woman on her phone. The camera moves past the building corner toward a wider intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with military vehicle crossing

events.description: military tank vehicle drives across the intersection from left to right
crossing the intersection and entering the residential neighborhood with single-family homes

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while a military tank vehicle passes by perpendicular to the path

notable_agents.action: military tank driving across the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: green military tank with treads driving on the road
tall purple and pink fast food restaurant sign

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a major intersection as a military tank drives past. The scene transitions from commercial to residential as the character approaches the Horny's Burgers restaurant and turns onto a quieter street with houses.

scene_state.functional_zone: suburban residential sidewalk with single-family homes

events.description: character passes two pedestrians walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the residential sidewalk past houses and palm trees, passing two oncoming pedestrians

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking toward the character on the sidewalk

entered.detail: single-story white house with red roof and front lawn
wooden utility pole with multiple power lines
black garbage bins on the curb near the house

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a quiet residential sidewalk lined with single-family homes, palm trees, and utility poles. Two pedestrians approach from the opposite direction and are passed as the character continues down the street.

agents.ego_description: continuing down the residential sidewalk past a foreclosure sign and more single-family homes

entered.detail: red and white real estate sign indicating foreclosure with phone number
red brick pillars with black metal fence sections

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the residential neighborhood, passing a red foreclosure sign in a front yard and walking along cracked concrete sidewalks lined with more houses and palm trees. The area shows signs of economic distress with the foreclosure signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bright Los Santos commercial strip that gradually transitions into a quiet, distressed residential neighborhood. It begins on a sunny sidewalk near a colorful food cart, moving across the street toward a prominent green pharmacy building. As the camera passes pedestrians along the storefront, the scene opens up into a major intersection where a military tank drives past, signaling a shift away from the commercial hub. The path then turns toward a quieter street, moving past a burger restaurant and into a residential zone lined with palm trees and utility poles. Finally, the camera continues along cracked concrete sidewalks past single-family homes, where the atmosphere shifts toward economic distress as a red foreclosure sign appears in a front yard.
